name: flutterbridge
description: FlutterBridge — Flutter Application Compiler Platform (Spec v2.0, frozen)

scripts.codegen: pnpm --filter @bridge/schema-codegen build && node tools/schema-codegen/dist/cli.js generate && pnpm --filter @bridge/catalog-codegen build && node tools/catalog-codegen/dist/cli.js && pnpm --filter @bridge/gen-react build && node tools/widget-support-doc.mjs
scripts.codegen:check: pnpm --filter @bridge/schema-codegen build && node tools/schema-codegen/dist/cli.js check && pnpm --filter @bridge/catalog-codegen build && node tools/catalog-codegen/dist/cli.js --check && pnpm --filter @bridge/gen-react build && node tools/widget-support-doc.mjs --check
scripts.ci: pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run lint:deps && pnpm run lint:stubs && pnpm run lint:portability && pnpm run verify:depcruise-negative
